title: "LargeDADA2andMicrobialStats"
author: "Mikayla Brueshaber"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:
## Load Data, Packages, and assign forward and reverse
```{r load data and packages}
library(dada2)
pathF <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/"
pathR <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/"
list.files(pathF)
list.files (pathR)
pathFAC22 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/MS22/"
pathRAC22 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/MS22/"
list.files(pathFAC22)
list.files(pathRAC22)
```

``` {r Forward and Reverse}
fastqFs <- sort(list.files(pathF, pattern="_R1_001.fastq", full.names = TRUE))
fastqRs <- sort(list.files(pathR, pattern="_R2_001.fastq", full.names = TRUE))
if(length(fastqFs) !=length(fastqRs)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match.")
AC22fastqFs <- sort(list.files(pathFAC22, pattern = "_R1_001.fastq", full.names = TRUE))
AC22fastqRs <- sort(list.files(pathRAC22, pattern="_R2_001.fastq", full.names = TRUE))
```

## Trim Data
``` {r Trim}
FWD <- "GTGYCAGCMGCCGCGGTAA"
REV <- "CCGYCAATTYMTTTRAGTTT"
trimLeft = c(FWD, REV)
dir.create(filtpathF, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(filtpathR, showWarnings = FALSE)
out <- filterAndTrim(fwd = fastqFs, filt = file.path(filtpathF, basename(fastqFs)), rev = fastqRs, filt.rev = file.path(filtpathR, basename(fastqRs)), truncLen = c(280,180), maxN = 0, maxEE = c(2,2), truncQ = 2, rm.phix = TRUE, compress = TRUE, multithread = TRUE, trimLeft = c(19,20))
head(out)
#Filter ACC 22
FWD <- "GTGYCAGCMGCCGCGGTAA"
REV <- "CCGYCAATTYMTTTRAGTTT"
trimLeft = c(FWD, REV)
out <- filterAndTrim(fwd = AC22fastqFs, filt = file.path(filtpathF, basename(AC22fastqFs)), rev = AC22fastqRs, filt.rev = file.path(filtpathR, basename(AC22fastqRs)), truncLen = c(280,180), maxN = 0, maxEE = c(2,2), truncQ = 2, rm.phix = TRUE, compress = TRUE, multithread = TRUE, trimLeft = c(19,20))
head(out)
```

```{r Load in Filtered Files}
filtpathF <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/"
filtpathR <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/"
save.image("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/post_filter.RData")
load("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/post_filter.RData")
```
```{r Parallization}
#ACCOMAC 2024, ACCOMAC 2023, ACCOMAC 2022, AOWA 2024, AOWA 2023, AOWA 2022
#Accomac 2024
filtpathFAC24 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Accomac 2024/"
filtpathRAC24 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Accomac 2024/"
filtFAC24s <- list.files(filtpathFAC24, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAC24s <- list.files(filtpathRAC24, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAC24 <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAC24s), "_"), function (x) paste (x[1], x[2]))
sample.namesAC24R <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAC24s), "_"), function (x) paste (x[1], x[2]))
if(!identical(sample.namesAC24, sample.namesAC24R)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAC24s) <- sample.namesAC24
names(filtRAC24s) <- sample.namesAC24R
```

## Batch Work
```{r ACCOMAC 2024}
set.seed(100)
errFAC24 <- learnErrors(filtFAC24s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
save.image("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/ErrFAC24.RData")
load("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/ErrFAC24.RData")
errRAC24 <- learnErrors(filtRAC24s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAC24 <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAC24))
names(mergersAC24) <- sample.namesAC24
for(sam in sample.namesAC24){
 cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
 derepFAC24 <- derepFastq(filtFAC24s[[sam]])
 ddFAC24 <- dada(derepFAC24, err= errFAC24, multithread = TRUE)
 derepRAC24 <- derepFastq(filtRAC24s[[sam]])
 ddRAC24 <- dada(derepRAC24, err = errRAC24, multithread = TRUE)
 mergerAC24 <- mergePairs(ddFAC24, derepFAC24, ddRAC24, derepRAC24)
 mergersAC24[[sam]] <- mergerAC24
 }
rm(derepFAC24); rm(derepRAC24)
seqtabAC24 <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAC24)
saveRDS(seqtabAC24, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAC24.rds")
```

```{r Accomac 2023}
filtpathFAC23 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Accomac 2023/"
filtpathRAC23 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Accomac 2023/"
filtFAC23s <- list.files(filtpathFAC23, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAC23s <- list.files(filtpathRAC23, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAC23 <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAC23s), "_"), '[', 1)
sample.namesAC23R <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAC23s), "_"), '[', 1)
if(!identical(sample.namesAC23, sample.namesAC23R)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAC23s) <- sample.namesAC23
names(filtRAC23s) <- sample.namesAC23R
#LEARN ERRORS
set.seed(100)
errFAC23 <- learnErrors(filtFAC23s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
errRAC23 <- learnErrors(filtRAC23s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAC23 <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAC23))
names(mergersAC23) <- sample.namesAC23
for(sam in sample.namesAC23) {
  cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
derepFAC23 <- derepFastq(filtFAC23s[[sam]])
ddFAC23 <- dada(derepFAC23, err= errFAC23, multithread = TRUE)
derepRAC23 <- derepFastq(filtRAC23s[[sam]])
ddRAC23 <- dada(derepRAC23, err = errRAC23, multithread = TRUE)
mergerAC23 <- mergePairs(ddFAC23, derepFAC23, ddRAC23, derepRAC23)
mergersAC23[[sam]] <- mergerAC23
}
rm(derepFAC23); rm(derepRAC23)
seqtabAC23 <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAC23)
saveRDS(seqtabAC23, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAC23.rds")
save.image("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/ACC2423")
```

```{ ACCOMAC 2022}
filtpathFAC22 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Accomac 2022/"
filtpathRAC22 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Accomac 2022/"
filtFAC22s <- list.files(filtpathFAC22, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAC22s <- list.files(filtpathRAC22, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAC22 <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAC22s), "_"), '[', 1)
sample.namesAC22R <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAC22s), "_"), '[', 1)
if(!identical(sample.namesAC22, sample.namesAC22R)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAC22s) <- sample.namesAC22
names(filtRAC22s) <- sample.namesAC22R
#LEARN ERRORS
set.seed(100)
errFAC22 <- learnErrors(filtFAC22s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
errRAC22 <- learnErrors(filtRAC22s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAC22 <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAC22))
names(mergersAC22) <- sample.namesAC22
for(sam in sample.namesAC22) {
  cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
derepFAC22 <- derepFastq(filtFAC22s[[sam]])
ddFAC22 <- dada(derepFAC22, err= errFAC22, multithread = TRUE)
derepRAC22 <- derepFastq(filtRAC22s[[sam]])
ddRAC22 <- dada(derepRAC22, err = errRAC22, multithread = TRUE)
mergerAC22 <- mergePairs(ddFAC22, derepFAC22, ddRAC22, derepRAC22)
mergersAC22[[sam]] <- mergerAC22
}
rm(derepFAC22); rm(derepRAC22)
seqtabAC22 <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAC22)
saveRDS(seqtabAC22, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAC22.rds")
```

```{ r AOWA 2024}
filtpathFAO24 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Aowa 2024/"
filtpathRAO24 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Aowa 2024/"
filtFAO24s <- list.files(filtpathFAO24, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAO24s <- list.files(filtpathRAO24, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAO24 <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAO24s), "_"), '[', 1)
sample.namesAO24R <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAO24s), "_"), '[', 1)
if(!identical(sample.namesAO24, sample.namesAO24R)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAO24s) <- sample.namesAO24
names(filtRAO24s) <- sample.namesAO24R
#LEARN ERRORS
set.seed(100)
errFAO24 <- learnErrors(filtFAO24s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
errRAO24 <- learnErrors(filtRAO24s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAO24 <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAO24))
names(mergersAO24) <- sample.namesAO24
for(sam in sample.namesAO24) {
  cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
derepFAO24 <- derepFastq(filtFAO24s[[sam]])
ddFAO24 <- dada(derepFAO24, err= errFAO24, multithread = TRUE)
derepRAO24 <- derepFastq(filtRAO24s[[sam]])
ddRAO24 <- dada(derepRAO24, err = errRAO24, multithread = TRUE)
mergerAO24 <- mergePairs(ddFAO24, derepFAO24, ddRAO24, derepRAO24)
mergersAO24[[sam]] <- mergerAO24
}
rm(derepFAO24); rm(derepRAO24)
seqtabAO24 <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAO24)
saveRDS(seqtabAO24, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAO24.rds")
save.image("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/ACCAO24")
```

```{r AOWA 2023}
filtpathFAO23 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Aowa 2023/"
filtpathRAO23 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Aowa 2023/"
filtFAO23s <- list.files(filtpathFAO23, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAO23s <- list.files(filtpathRAO23, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAO23 <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAO23s), "_"), '[', 1)
sample.namesAO23R <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAO23s), "_"), '[', 1)
if(!identical(sample.namesAO23, sample.namesAO23R)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAO23s) <- sample.namesAO23
names(filtRAO23s) <- sample.namesAO23R
#LEARN ERRORS
set.seed(100)
errFAO23 <- learnErrors(filtFAO23s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
errRAO23 <- learnErrors(filtRAO23s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose= TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAO23 <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAO23))
names(mergersAO23) <- sample.namesAO23
for(sam in sample.namesAO23) {
  cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
derepFAO23 <- derepFastq(filtFAO23s[[sam]])
ddFAO23 <- dada(derepFAO23, err= errFAO23, multithread = TRUE)
derepRAO23 <- derepFastq(filtRAO23s[[sam]])
ddRAO23 <- dada(derepRAO23, err = errRAO23, multithread = TRUE)
mergerAO23 <- mergePairs(ddFAO23, derepFAO23, ddRAO23, derepRAO23)
mergersAO23[[sam]] <- mergerAO23
}
rm(derepFAO23); rm(derepRAO23)
seqtabAO23 <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAO23)
saveRDS(seqtabAO23, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAO23.rds")
save.image("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/ACCAO2423")
```
```{r AOWA 2022}
filtpathFAO22 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Aowa 2022/"
filtpathRAO22 <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Aowa 2022/"
filtFAO22s <- list.files(filtpathFAO22, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAO22s <- list.files(filtpathRAO22, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAO22 <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAO22s), "_"), '[', 1)
sample.namesAO22R <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAO22s), "_"), '[', 1)
if(!identical(sample.namesAO22, sample.namesAO22R)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAO22s) <- sample.namesAO22
names(filtRAO22s) <- sample.namesAO22R
#LEARN ERRORS
set.seed(100)
errFAO22 <- learnErrors(filtFAO22s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
errRAO22 <- learnErrors(filtRAO22s, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAO22 <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAO22))
names(mergersAO22) <- sample.namesAO22
for(sam in sample.namesAO22) {
  cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
derepFAO22 <- derepFastq(filtFAO22s[[sam]])
ddFAO22 <- dada(derepFAO22, err= errFAO22, multithread = TRUE)
derepRAO22 <- derepFastq(filtRAO22s[[sam]])
ddRAO22 <- dada(derepRAO22, err = errRAO22, multithread = TRUE)
mergerAO22 <- mergePairs(ddFAO22, derepFAO22, ddRAO22, derepRAO22)
mergersAO22[[sam]] <- mergerAO22
}
rm(derepFAO22); rm(derepRAO22)
seqtabAO22 <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAO22)
saveRDS(seqtabAO22, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAO22.rds")
save.image <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/ALLSEQ"
load("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/ALLSEQ")
```

```{r AOWA Inter-Ship}
pathFAOIS <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/AOIS"
pathRAOIS <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/AOIS/"
list.files(pathFAOIS)
list.files(pathRAOIS)

AOISfastqFs <- sort(list.files(pathFAOIS, pattern = "_R1_001.fastq", full.names = TRUE))
AOISfastqRs <- sort(list.files(pathRAOIS, pattern="_R2_001.fastq", full.names = TRUE))
#trim
FWD <- "GTGYCAGCMGCCGCGGTAA"
REV <- "CCGYCAATTYMTTTRAGTTT"
trimLeft = c(FWD, REV)
dir.create(filtpathF, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(filtpathR, showWarnings = FALSE)
outAI <- filterAndTrim(fwd = AOISfastqFs, filt = file.path(filtpathF, basename(AOISfastqFs)), rev = AOISfastqRs, filt.rev = file.path(filtpathR, basename(AOISfastqRs)), truncLen = c(280,180), maxN = 0, maxEE = c(2,2), truncQ = 2, rm.phix = TRUE, compress = TRUE, multithread = TRUE, trimLeft = c(19,20))
head(outAI)
# LOAD IN FILTERED FILES
filtpathF <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/"
filtpathR <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/"
filtpathFAOIS <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Forward/filtered/Aowa Inter-Ship//"
filtpathRAOIS <- "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/Reverse/filtered/Aowa Inter-Ship//"
filtFAOISs <- list.files(filtpathFAOIS, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names=TRUE)
filtRAOISs <- list.files(filtpathRAOIS, pattern = "fastq.gz", full.names = TRUE)
#Check Sample Names
sample.namesAOIS <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtFAOISs), "_"), function (x) paste (x[1], x[2]))
sample.namesAOISR <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtRAOISs), "_"), function (x) paste (x[1], x[2]))
if(!identical(sample.namesAOIS, sample.namesAOISR)) stop("Forward and reverse files do not match,")
names(filtFAOISs) <- sample.namesAOIS
names(filtRAOISs) <- sample.namesAOISR
#LEARN ERRORS
set.seed(100)
errFAOIS <- learnErrors(filtFAOISs, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#save.image("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/ErrFAOIS.RData")
#load("C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/ErrFAOIS.RData")
errRAOIS <- learnErrors(filtRAOISs, nbases = 5e7, multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
#Merge pairs
mergersAOIS <- vector("list", length(sample.namesAOIS))
names(mergersAOIS) <- sample.namesAOIS
for(sam in sample.namesAOIS){
  cat("Processing:", sam, "\n")
  derepFAOIS <- derepFastq(filtFAOISs[[sam]])
  ddFAOIS <- dada(derepFAOIS, err= errFAOIS, multithread = TRUE)
  derepRAOIS <- derepFastq(filtRAOISs[[sam]])
  ddRAOIS <- dada(derepRAOIS, err = errRAOIS, multithread = TRUE)
  mergerAOIS <- mergePairs(ddFAOIS, derepFAOIS, ddRAOIS, derepRAOIS)
  mergersAOIS[[sam]] <- mergerAOIS
}
rm(derepFAOIS); rm(derepRAOIS)
seqtabAOIS <- makeSequenceTable(mergersAOIS)
saveRDS(seqtabAOIS, "C:/Users/watts/Documents/Raw Data/AR+MS+MB/seqtabAOIS.rds")
```

## COMBINE BATCHES and TAXONOMY
```{r Merge Sequence Tables}
st.all <- mergeSequenceTables(seqtabAC24, seqtabAC23, seqtabAC22, seqtabAO24, seqtabAO23, seqtabAO22, seqtabAOIS)
seqtab <- removeBimeraDenovo(st.all, method = "consensus", multithread = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)
```
```{r Assign and Export Taxonomy}
tax <- assignTaxonomy(seqtab, "C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/silva_nr_v132_train_set.fa.gz", multithread = TRUE)
#Export Taxonomy
taxa.print <- tax
rownames(taxa.print) <- NULL
head(taxa.print)

write.csv(tax, file = "ASVs_taxonomy")
write.csv(tax, file = "ASVa_taxonomy.csv")
saveRDS(tax, "ASVa_taxonomy.rds")

asv_headers <- vector(dim(seqtab)[2], mode = "character")
count.asv.tab <- t(seqtab)
row.names(count.asv.tab) <- sub(">", "", asv_headers)
write.csv(count.asv.tab, file = "ASVs_counts.csv")
saveRDS(count.asv.tab, file = "ASVs_counts.rds")

View(count.asv.tab)
View(taxa.print)
View(tax)
View(count.asv.tab)

write.csv(tax, file = "ASVs_taxonomy.csv")
saveRDS(tax, "ASVs_taxonomy.rds")
write.csv(tax, file = "asvs_taxonomy.csv")
saveRDS(tax, "asvs_taxonomy.rds")

asv_headers <- vector(dim(seqtab)[2], mode = "character")
count.asv.tab <- t(seqtab)
row.names(count.asv.tab) <- sub(">", "", asv_headers)
write.csv(count.asv.tab, file = "asvs_count.csv")
saveRDS(count.asv.tab, file = "asvs_counts.rds")

asv_seqs <- colnames(seqtab)
asv_headers <- vector(dim(seqtab)[2], mode="character")
for (i in 1:dim(seqtab)[2]) {asv_headers[i] <- paste(">ASV", i, sep="_")}

asv_fasta <- c(rbind(asv_headers, asv_seqs))
asv_otu <- t(seqtab)
row.names(asv_otu) <- sub(">", "", asv_headers)
asv_tax <- tax
row.names(asv_tax) <- sub(">", "", asv_headers)
OTU_TAX_table <- merge(asv_otu, asv_tax, by=0)
write(asv_fasta, "asv_fasta.fa")
write.table(asv_otu, "asv_otu.csv", sep=",", quote=F, col.names=NA)
write.table(asv_tax, "asv_tax.csv", sep=",", quote=F, col.names=NA)
write.table(OTU_TAX_table, "OTU_TAX_table.csv", sep=",", quote=F, col.names=NA)
```
## Plotting
```{r Load in Packages and Data}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(phyloseq)
asv_otu_all <-read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/asv_otu.csv")
asv_otu_all <- read.csv("./")
tax_data <- read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles//asv_tax.csv")
metadata <- read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/MetadataALL.csv")
```
```{r Join Data}
#join data
asv_otu_all <- asv_otu_all %>%
  rename(ASV = X)
tax_data <- tax_data %>%
  rename(ASV = X)
rownames(tax_data) <- paste0("ASV_", rownames(tax_data))
tax_mat <- as.matrix(tax_data)
asv_long <- asv_otu_all %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -ASV, names_to = "sample", values_to = "abundance") #reshapes data
asv_long <- left_join(asv_long, tax_data, by = "ASV" ) #joins the long version OTU file with the taxonomic data by ASV
colnames(asv_long) #checks the column names to ensure the data was joined correctly
n_genera <- length(unique(asv_long$Genus)) #counts the number of genera from the data
asv_long <- asv_long %>%
  rename(Sample_id=sample) #renames the sample column to sample id
asv_meta <- left_join(asv_long, metadata, by = "Sample_id") #joins the metadata with the previously joined taxonomic and OTU data
asv_meta2 <- filter(asv_meta, !Kingdom == "Eukaryota")
```
```{r Setup Phyloseq}
asv_otu_all_fixed <-t(asv_otu_all) #switches rows and columns to be read by phyloseq 
colnames(asv_otu_all_fixed) <- asv_otu_all_fixed [1,] #makes the first row of the data the column names
asv_otu_all_fixed <- asv_otu_all_fixed[-1,] #removes the first row bc they're now the column names
asv_otu_all_fixed <- apply(asv_otu_all_fixed, 2, as.numeric) #converts values to numeric instead of character
otu <- otu_table(as.matrix(asv_otu_all_fixed), taxa_are_rows = FALSE) #converts into phyloseq otu table where taxa are columns and samples are rows
ps <- phyloseq(otu) #starts phyloseq
ps <- merge_phyloseq(ps, sample_data(metadata)) #merges ps with the metadata
ps <- merge_phyloseq(ps, tax_table(tax_mat))

meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps)) #extracts metadata into a separate data frame

meta$Subject <- rownames(meta) #creates a Subject column with the sample ids
sample_data(ps) <- sample_data(meta) #includes the new subject column in the phyloseq table
```
```{r Alpha Diversity}
shannon_df<- estimate_richness(ps, measures = "Shannon")
shannon_df$Subject <- rownames(shannon_df)
metashannon <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
df <-metashannon %>%
  left_join(shannon_df, by = "Subject")
ggplot(df, aes(x= Ship, y = Shannon)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal()+
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Ship))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.5))
Simpson_df$Subject <- rownames(Simpson_df)
metasimpson <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
dfSi <- metasimpson %>%
  left_join(Simpson_df, by ="Subject")
Sibp <- ggplot(dfSi, aes(x=Ship, y = Simpson)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal()+
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Ship))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.5))

plot_richness(ps, x="Ship", measures=c("Shannon", "Simpson"), color="Ship") #plots Shannon diversity index and Simpson diversity index using the phyloseq table created above using sample id as the color
plot_richness(ps, x="Sample_id", measures=c("Shannon", "Simpson"), color="Ship") #plots Shannon diversity index and Simpson diversity index using the phyloseq table created above using sample type as the color
plot_richness(ps_ACCallyears, x= "Sample_id", measures = c("Shannon", "Simpson"), color = "Sample_id")
psAowa <-plot_richness(ps_AOWAallyears, x= "Sample_id", measures = c("Shannon", "Simpson"), color = "Sample_id")
ggsave("richness_plotACC.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300) #saves plot in environment and R files as Richness_plotACC.png
ggsave("richness_plotACCST.png", plot = pst, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300) #saves plot in environment and R files as richness_plotACCST.png where ST refers to sample type
# code for subsetting samples
ps_subset <- prune_samples(sample_names(ps) %in% paste0("SS", sprintf("%03d", 1:16)), ps)
p <- plot_richness(ps_subset, x = "Sample_id", measures = c("Shannon", "Simpson"), color = "Sample_id")
p <- p + labs(x = "Aowa Spring 2022 Samples", title = "Shannon and Simpson Diversity-Aowa Spring 2022")
pst <- plot_richness(ps_subset, x = "Sample_id", measures = c("Shannon", "Simpson"), color = "Sample_type")
ggsave("richness_plot_Aowa_2022.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ps_AOWAallyears<- subset_samples(ps, Ship == "Aowa")
ps_ACCallyears <- subset_samples(ps, Ship == "Accomac")
ps2022 <- subset_samples(ps, Year == 2022)
ps2023 <- subset_samples(ps, Year == 2023)
ps2024 <- subset_samples(ps, Year == 2024)
ps0m <- subset_samples(ps, Meters == 0)
```
```{r Original Bray Curtis}
# Transform data to proportions as appropriate for Bray-Curtis distances
ps.prop <- transform_sample_counts(ps, function(otu) otu/sum(otu)) #shows relative abundance instead of raw counts
ps.propfull <- transform_sample_counts(ps, function(otu) otu/sum(otu)) #shows relative abundance instead of raw counts
ps.AOWAprop <- transform_sample_counts(ps_AOWAallyears, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))
ps.ACCprop <- transform_sample_counts(ps_ACCallyears, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))
ps.2022prop <- transform_sample_counts(ps2022, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))
ps.2023prop <- transform_sample_counts(ps2023, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))
ps.2024prop <- transform_sample_counts(ps2024, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))

ord.nmds.bray <- ordinate(ps.prop, method="NMDS", distance="bray") #completes ordination using bray-curtis on relative abundance data
ord.nmds.brayAOWA <- ordinate(ps.AOWAprop, method="NMDS", distance="bray")
ord.nmds.brayACC <- ordinate(ps.ACCprop, method="NMDS", distance="bray")
ord.nmds.bray22 <-ordinate(ps.2022prop, method="NMDS", distance="bray")
ord.nmds.bray23 <-ordinate(ps.2023prop, method="NMDS", distance="bray")
ord.nmds.bray24 <-ordinate(ps.2024prop, method="NMDS", distance="bray")

plot_ordination(ps.prop, ord.nmds.bray, color = "Location", title = "Bray NMDS") #creates plot of NMDS from Bray Curtis where the color is based on the sample type
plot_ordination(ps.AOWAprop, ord.nmds.brayAOWA, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS Aowa 2022-2024")
bACC <-plot_ordination(ps.ACCprop, ord.nmds.brayACC, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS Accomac 2022-24")
b22 <- plot_ordination(ps.2022prop, ord.nmds.bray22, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS Accomac and Aowa 2022")
b23 <- plot_ordination(ps.2023prop, ord.nmds.bray23, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS Accomac and Aowa 2023")
b24 <- plot_ordination(ps.2024prop, ord.nmds.bray24, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS Accomac and Aowa 2024")

bSI<-plot_ordination(ps.prop, ord.nmds.bray, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS") #creates plot of NMDS from Bray Curtis where color is based on the sample location
bSI_labeled <- bSI + geom_text(aes(label = Sample_id), size = 3)
bAoL <- bAOWA + geom_text(aes(label = Sample_id), size =3)
bAcL <- bACC + geom_text(aes(label = Sample_id), size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE)
ord.nmds.bray <- ordinate(ps.propfull, method="NMDS", distance="bray") #completes ordination using bray-curtis on relative abundance data
b<-plot_ordination(ps.propfull, ord.nmds.bray, color = "sample_type", title = "Bray NMDS") #creates plot of NMDS from Bray Curtis where the color is based on the sample type
bSIALL<-plot_ordination(ps.propfull, ord.nmds.bray, color = "Sample_id", title = "Bray NMDS") #creates plot of NMDS from Bray Curtis where color is based on the sample location
bSI_labeled <- bSI + geom_text(aes(label = Sample_id), size = 3)
```
```{ r Abundance Measures}
top20_genera <- asv_long %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>% #groups asv_long by genus
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Genus) #stores top 20
asv_top20 <- asv_long %>%
  mutate(Genus_grouped = ifelse(Genus %in% top20_genera, Genus, "Other")) #adds new column in asv_long for grouped genus and replaces genus with other if not in top 20
top20_0m <- names(sort(taxa_sums(ps0m), decreasing = TRUE)) [1:20]
ps0mTop20 <- prune_taxa(top20_0m, ps0m)
#Plot abundance
plot_bar(ps0mTop20, x = "Sample_id", fill = "Order")
  
ps.genusAOIS <- tax_glom(ps.propAOIS, taxrank = "Genus")
top20_generaAOIS <- names(sort(taxa_sums(ps.genusAOIS), decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]
df_AOIS <- psmelt(ps.genusAOIS) 
df$Genus_grouped <- ifelse(df$Genus %in% top20_genera, as.character(df$Genus), "Other")

ggplot(df_AOIS, aes(x = Sample_id, y = abundance, fill=Genus_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Aowa Intership Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Genus") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_data$Genus_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
plot_data <- asv_top20 %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Genus_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Sample_id, y = abundance, fill=Genus_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Accomac and Aowa Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Genus") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_data$Genus_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
```
```{r Inter-Ship and Transect Samples Broken Up}
AOISamples <- c( "Aowa1.S311","Aowa10.S316","Aowa11.S320","Aowa2.S315","Aowa3.S319","Aowa4.S323", "Aowa5.S327","Aowa6.S331","Aowa7.S335","Aowa8.S339","Aowa9.S312", "SS016", "SS064", "SS0144", "SS015", "SS063", "SS0143" )
ps_AOIS <- subset_samples(ps, Sample_id %in% AOISamples)
ps_transect <- subset_samples(ps, !(Sample_id %in% AOISamples))
ps_ACC <- subset_samples(ps_transect, (Ship == "Accomac"))
ps_Aowa <- subset_samples(ps_transect, (Ship == "Aowa"))
psA <-subset_samples(ps, (Ship == "Aowa"))

ps.propAOIS <- transform_sample_counts(ps_AOIS, function(otu) otu/sum(otu)) #shows relative abundance instead of raw counts
ps.propTransect <- transform_sample_counts(ps_transect, function(otu) otu/sum(otu)) #shows relative abundance instead of raw counts
ps.propACC <- transform_sample_counts(ps_ACC, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))
ps.propAowa <- transform_sample_counts(ps_Aowa, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))
ps.propA <- transform_sample_counts(psA, function(otu) otu/sum(otu))

sample_data(ps.propAOIS)$Year <- as.factor(sample_data(ps.propAOIS)$Year)
sample_data(ps.propTransect)$Year <- as.factor(sample_data(ps.propTransect)$Year)
sample_data(ps.propACC)$Year <- as.factor(sample_data(ps.propACC)$Year)
sample_data(ps.propAowa)$Year <- as.factor(sample_data(ps.propAowa)$Year)
sample_data(ps.propA)$Year <- as.factor(sample_data(ps.propA)$Year)
sample_data(ps.prop)$Year <- as.factor(sample_data(ps.prop)$Year)

ord.nmds.brayAOIS <- ordinate(ps.propAOIS, method="NMDS", distance="bray") #completes ordination using bray-curtis on relative abundance data
ord.nmds.brayTransect <- ordinate(ps.propTransect, method="NMDS", distance="bray") #completes ordination using bray-curtis on relative abundance data
ord.nmds.brayACC <- ordinate(ps.propACC, method = "NMDS", distance = "bray")
ord.nmds.brayAowa <-ordinate(ps.propAowa, method = "NMDS", distance = "bray")
ord.nmds.brayA <- ordinate(ps.propA, method = "NMDS", distance = "bray")

plot_ordination(ps.propAOIS, ord.nmds.brayAOIS, color = "Location", shape = "Year", title = "Bray NMDS Inter-Ship Samples") +
  geom_point(size = 2)#creates plot of NMDS from Bray Curtis where the color is based on the sample type
plot_ordination(ps.propTransect, ord.nmds.brayTransect, color = "Location", shape = "Year", title = "Bray NMDS Transect Samples") +
  geom_point(size = 3)+
  scale_color_manual(values = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(sample_data(ps.propTransect)$Location))))
plot_ordination(ps.propACC, ord.nmds.brayACC, color = "Location", shape = "Year", title = "Bray NMDS Accomac Samples") +
  geom_point(size = 3)
plot_ordination(ps.propAowa, ord.nmds.brayAowa, color = "Location", shape = "Year", title = "Bray NMDS Aowa Transect Samples") +
  geom_point(size = 3)
plot_ordination(ps.propA, ord.nmds.brayA, color ="Direction", shape = "Year", title = "Bray NMDS Aowa Samples")
plot_ordination(ps.prop, ord.nmds.bray, color = "Ship", shape = "Year", title = "Bray NMDS All Samples")

top20_AOIS<- names(sort(taxa_sums(ps_AOIS), decreasing = TRUE)) [1:20]
top20_transect <- names(sort(taxa_sums(ps_transect), decreasing = TRUE)) [1:20]
psAOISTop20 <- prune_taxa(top20_AOIS, ps_AOIS)
ps_transecttop20 <- prune_taxa(top20_transect, ps_transect)
plot_bar(psAOISTop20, x = "Sample_id", fill = "Family")
plot_bar(ps_transecttop20, x = "Sample_id", fill = "Order")

plot_bar(ps.propAOIS, x = "Sample_id", fill = "Class") + geom_bar(stat = "identity")
```
```{ r Relative Abundance}
ASVLONG_AOIS <- asv_long %>%
  filter(Sample_id %in% AOISamples)
ASVLONG_transect <- asv_long %>%
  filter(!Sample_id %in% AOISamples)
ASVLONG_transect <- ASVLONG_transect %>% left_join(metaTrans %>% select(Sample_id, Year), by = "Sample_id")
asvwidetrans$Year <- metaTrans$Year
ASVLONG2324Transect <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  filter(!Year == "2022")

ASVLONG_AOIS <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  group_by(Sample_id)%>%
  mutate(rel_abundance = abundance / sum(abundance, na.rm =TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()
asv_long <- asv_long %>%
  group_by(Sample_id) %>%
  mutate(rel_abundance = abundance / sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()
ASVLONG_transect <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  group_by(Sample_id)%>%
  mutate(rel_abundance = abundance / sum(abundance, na.rm =TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

top20AOIS_genera <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Genus) #stores top 20
top20_genera <- asv_long %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>% #groups asv_long by genus
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Genus) #stores top 20
RA_order <- asv_long %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE))
top20transect_genera <-ASVLONG_transect %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>% #groups asv_long by genus
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Genus) #stores top 20
top20AOIS_Family <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  group_by(Family)%>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Family) #stores top 20
top20Transect_Family <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  group_by(Family)%>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Family) #stores top 20
top20AOIS_Order <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  group_by(Order)%>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Order) #stores top 20
top20Transect_Order <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  group_by(Order)%>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% #sums total abundance across samples
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>% #sorts genera from most to least abundance
  slice_head(n= 20) %>% #keeps top 20 genera
  pull(Order) #stores top 20
top20Order <- asv_long %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  summarise(total_rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_rel_abundance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)%>%
  pull(Order)

asv_top20AOIS <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  mutate(Genus_grouped = ifelse(Genus %in% top20AOIS_genera, Genus, "Other")) #adds new column in asv_long for grouped genus and replaces genus with other if not in top 20
asv_top20 <- asv_long %>%
  mutate(Genus_grouped = ifelse(Genus %in% top20_genera, Genus, "Other")) #adds new column in asv_long for grouped genus and replaces genus with other if not in top 20
asv_top20transect <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  mutate(Genus_grouped = ifelse(Genus %in% top20transect_genera, Genus, "Other")) #adds new column in asv_long for grouped genus and replaces genus with other if not in top 20

asv_top20AOISFam <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  mutate(Family_grouped = ifelse(Family %in% top20AOIS_Family, Family, "Other"))
asv_top20TransectFam <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  mutate(Family_grouped = ifelse(Family %in% top20Transect_Family, Family, "Other"))

asv_top20AOISOrder <- ASVLONG_AOIS %>%
  mutate(Order_grouped = ifelse(Order %in% top20AOIS_Order, Order, "Other"))
asv_top20TransectOrder <- ASVLONG_transect %>%
  mutate(Order_grouped = ifelse(Order %in% top20Transect_Order, Order, "Other"))
asv_top20Order <- asv_long %>% 
  mutate(Order_grouped = ifelse(Order %in% top20Order, Order, "Other"))

plot_dataAOIS <- asv_top20AOIS %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Genus_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample
plot_data <- asv_top20 %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Genus_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample
plot_dataTransect <- asv_top20transect %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Genus_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample


plot_dataAOISFam <- asv_top20AOISFam %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Family_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample
plot_dataTransectFam <- asv_top20TransectFam %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Family_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample

plot_dataAOISOrder <- asv_top20AOISOrder %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Order_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample
plot_dataTransectOrder <- asv_top20TransectOrder %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Order_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample
plot_dataOrder <- asv_top20Order %>%
  group_by(Sample_id, Order_grouped) %>% #groups data by sample and genus grouped column
  summarise(rel_abundance = sum(rel_abundance, na.rm =  TRUE), .groups = "drop") #calculates total abundance of genus per sample

plot_dataOrder <- plot_dataOrder %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(Sample_id, Location), by = "Sample_id")
plot_dataOrder <- plot_dataOrder %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(Sample_id, Site), by = "Sample_id")

ggplot(plot_dataAOIS, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Genus_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Aowa Inter-Ship Samples Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Genus") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_dataAOIS$Genus_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
ggplot(plot_dataTransect, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Genus_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.15) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Accomac and Aowa Transect Samples Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Genus") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_dataTransect$Genus_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Genus_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Accomac and Aowa Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Genus") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_data$Genus_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
ggplot(plot_dataAOISFam, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Family_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.15) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Aowa Inter-Ship Samples Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Family") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_dataAOIS$Genus_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
ggplot(plot_dataTransectFam, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Family_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.15) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Accomac and Aowa Transect Samples Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Family") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_dataTransectFam$Family_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
ggplot(plot_dataAOISOrder, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Order_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.15) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Aowa Inter-Ship Samples Microbial Composition",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Order") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_dataAOISOrder$Order_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
ggplot(plot_dataTransectOrder, aes(x = Sample_id, y = rel_abundance, fill=Order_grouped))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.15) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Accomac and Aowa Transect Sample Microbial Composition by Order",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       x = "Sample",
       fill = "Order") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = hue_pal()(length(unique(plot_dataTransectOrder$Order_grouped)))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust =1))
```
##SIMPER
```{r Load in Packages}
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```
``` { r SIMPER for Order Level}
order_long <- asv_long %>% group_by(Sample_id, Order) %>% summarise(abundance = sum(abundance), .groups = "drop")
order_longTransect <- ASVLONG_transect %>% group_by(Sample_id, Order) %>% summarise(abundance = sum(abundance), .groups = "drop")
order_long2324Transect <- ASVLONG2324Transect %>% group_by(Sample_id, Order) %>% summarise(abundance = sum(abundance), .groups = "drop")
com_order <- order_long %>% pivot_wider( names_from = Order, values_from = abundance, values_fill = 0 )
com_order_transect <- order_longTransect %>% pivot_wider( names_from = Order, values_from = abundance, values_fill = 0)
comorder2324trans <- order_long2324Transect %>% pivot_wider( names_from = Order, values_from = abundance, values_fill = 0)
sample_ids <- com_order$Sample_id
com_order <- com_order[ , -1]
sample_idstrans <- com_order_transect$Sample_id
com_order_transect <- com_order_transect [, -1]
sample_id2324trans <- comorder2324trans$Sample_id
comorder2324trans <- comorder2324trans [, -1]
write.csv(com_order, "C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/Order_count_all.csv")
write.csv(com_order_transect, "C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/Order_count_transect.csv")
write.csv(comorder2324trans, "C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles//comorder2324Transec")
comorder2324trans <- read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/comorder2324Transec")
order_all <- read.csv("c:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/Order_count_all.csv")
order_all2 <- as.data.frame(order_all)
order_transect2 <- as.data.frame(com_order_transect)
order2324Transect2 <- as.data.frame(comorder2324trans)
com_order.mdf <- as.matrix(com_order)
com_ordertrans.mdf <- as.matrix(com_order_transect)
comordertrans2324.mdf <- as.matrix(comorder2324trans)
order_count.bray.all <- vegdist(com_order.mdf, method = "bray")
order_count.bray.all
order_counttrans.bray.all <- vegdist(com_ordertrans.mdf, method = "bray")
order_counttrans.bray.all
orderall <- cbind(meta, order_all2)
ordertrans <- cbind(metaTrans, order_transect2)
simper_orderall <- with(orderall, simper(order_all2, orderall$Site))
sumSOA <- summary(simper_orderall)
sumSOA
for (comparison in names(sumSOA)) {
  simper_dfallsc <- as.data.frame(sumSOA[[comparison]])
  write.csv(simper_dfallsc, file = paste0("allscsimper_", comparison, ".csv"), row.names = TRUE)
}
simper_ordertrans <- with(ordertrans, simper(order_transect2, ordertrans$Location))
sumSOT <- summary(simper_ordertrans)
for (comparison in names(sumSOT)) {
  simper_dfTranssc <- as.data.frame(sumSOT[[comparison]])
  write.csv(simper_dfTranssc, file = paste0("Transscsimper_", comparison, ".csv"), row.names = TRUE)
}

top20_sig <- simper_dfallsc[order(simper_dfallsc$p), ][1:50, ]
top20_sig
view(sumSOA)

three_star <- subset(simper_dfallsc, p <= 0.001)
three_star
two_star <- subset(simper_dfallsc, p <= 0.01)
two_star
```
## ANOSIM
``` {r ANOSIM and Bray Curtis try two}
meta <- read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/MetadataALL.csv")
metaTrans <- filter(meta, Site == "Transect")
metaAcc <- filter(metaTrans, Ship =="Accomac")
metaAowaT <- filter(metaTrans, Ship == "Aowa")

##Transpose data
asv_otu_all2 <- asv_otu_all %>%
  filter(ASV %in% asv_meta2$ASV)
asv_transposed <- t(asv_otu_all)
asv_transposed2 <- t(asv_otu_all2)
asv_transposed <- as.data.frame(asv_transposed)
asv_transposed2 <- as.data.frame(asv_transposed2)
asv_table_fixed <- asv_transposed
asv_table_fixed2 <- asv_transposed2
colnames(asv_table_fixed) <- asv_table_fixed[1, ]   # use first row as headers
colnames(asv_table_fixed2) <- asv_table_fixed2[1, ]
asv_table_fixed <- asv_table_fixed[-1, ]            # remove the first row
asv_table_fixed <- as.data.frame(asv_table_fixed)
df_otu <- asv_table_fixed %>% rownames_to_column(var = "Sample_id")
nmds_asv_otu <- inner_join(meta, df_otu, by="Sample_id")
write.table(nmds_asv_otu, "/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/nmds_asv_otu.csv", sep=",", quote=F, col.names=NA)
asv_table_fixed2 <- asv_table_fixed2[-1, ]            # remove the first row
asv_table_fixed2 <- as.data.frame(asv_table_fixed2)
df_otu2 <- asv_table_fixed2 %>% rownames_to_column(var = "Sample_id")
nmds_asv_otu2 <- inner_join(meta, df_otu2, by="Sample_id")
write.table(nmds_asv_otu2, "/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/nmds_asv_otu2.csv", sep=",", quote=F, col.names=NA)


#community matrix
pc <- read.csv("/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/nmds_asv_otu.csv")
pc2 <- nmds_asv_otu2
com <- pc[,14:ncol(pc)]
com2 <- pc2[, 13:ncol(pc2)]
view(com2)
com2_num <- com2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(.)))

#turn ASV information into a matrix
m_com <- as.matrix(com)
m_com2 <- as.matrix(com2_num)
view(m_com)
m_com2
#Run NMDS using Bray-Curtis distance
set.seed(123)
nmds2 <- metaMDS(m_com2, distance="bray") #stress = 0.1244532 
nmdsTransect <- metaMDS(m_com_ano_transect, distance = "bray")
nmdsAOIS <- metaMDS(m_comAOIS, distance = "bray")
nmdsAcc <- metaMDS(m_com_Acc, distance = "bray")
nmdsAowaT <- metaMDS(m_com_AowaT, distance = "bray")
plot(nmds2)
plot(nmdsTransect)
plot(nmdsAOIS)
plot(nmdsAcc)
plot(nmdsAowaT)
#access the specific points data of the NMDS plot & scores
str(nmds2)
nmds2$points
scores(nmds2)
str(nmdsTransect)
nmdsTransect$points
scores(nmdsTransect)
str(nmdsAOIS)
nmdsAOIS$points
scores(nmdsAOIS)
str(nmdsAcc)
nmdsAcc$points
scores(nmdsAcc)
str(nmdsAowaT)
nmdsAowaT$points
scores(nmdsAowaT)
#extract NMDS scores
data.scores = as.data.frame(scores(nmds)$sites)
data.scoresT = as.data.frame(scores(nmdsTransect)$sites)
dsAOIS = as.data.frame(scores(nmdsAOIS)$sites)
dsAcc = as.data.frame(scores(nmdsAcc)$sites)
dsAowaT = as.data.frame(scores(nmdsAowaT)$sites)
ds2 = as.data.frame(scores(nmds2)$sites)
#add columns to data frame
data.scores$Sample_id = pc$Sample_id
data.scores$Location = pc$Location
data.scores$Meters = pc$Meters
data.scores$Year = pc$Year
data.scores$Ship = pc$Ship
data.scores$Site = pc$Site
data.scores$Direction = pc$Direction
data.scoresT$Sample_id = pc_ano_transect$Sample_id
data.scoresT$Location = pc_ano_transect$Location
data.scoresT$Meters = pc_ano_transect$Meters
data.scoresT$Year = pc_ano_transect$Year
data.scoresT$Ship = pc_ano_transect$Ship
data.scoresT$Site = pc_ano_transect$Site
data.scoresT$Direction = pc_ano_transect$Direction
dsAOIS$Sample_id = pcAOIS$Sample_id
dsAOIS$Location = pcAOIS$Location
dsAOIS$Meters = pcAOIS$Meters
dsAOIS$Year = pcAOIS$Year
dsAOIS$Ship = pcAOIS$Ship
dsAOIS$Site = pcAOIS$Site
dsAcc$Sample_id = pc_Acc$Sample_id
dsAcc$Location = pc_Acc$Location
dsAcc$Meters = pc_Acc$Meters
dsAcc$Year = pc_Acc$Year
dsAcc$Ship = pc_Acc$Ship
dsAcc$Site = pc_Acc$Site
dsAcc$Direction = pc_Acc$Direction
dsAowaT$Sample_id = pc_AowaT$Sample_id
dsAowaT$Location = pc_AowaT$Location
dsAowaT$Meters = pc_AowaT$Meters
dsAowaT$Year = pc_AowaT$Year
dsAowaT$Ship = pc_AowaT$Ship
dsAowaT$Site = pc_AowaT$Site
dsAowaT$Direction = pc_AowaT$Direction
ds2$Sample_id = pc2$Sample_id
ds2$Location = pc2$Location
ds2$Meters = pc2$Meters
ds2$Year = pc2$Year
ds2$Ship = pc2$Ship
ds2$Site = pc2$Site
ds2$Direction = pc2$Direction
head(data.scores)
head(data.scoresT)
head(dsAOIS)
head(dsAcc)
head(dsAowaT)
head(ds2)

data.scoresT$Meters <- as.factor(data.scoresT$Meters)
data.scoresT$Year <- as.factor(data.scoresT$Year)
dsAOIS$Year <- as.factor(dsAOIS$Year)
data.scores$Year <- as.factor(data.scores$Year)
dsAcc$Meters <- as.factor(dsAcc$Meters)
dsAowaT$Meters <- as.factor(dsAowaT$Meters)
dsAcc$Year <- as.factor(dsAcc$Year)
dsAowaT$Year <- as.factor(dsAowaT$Year)
#graphing NMDS
# Samples by Wreck
ggplot(dsAowaT, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, aes(colour = Direction, shape = Year))+
  scale_fill_discrete()+
  ggtitle("NMDS Ordination - Samples by Location")+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face ="bold", colour ="black"),
        legend.position = "right", axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, colour = "black"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
        panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
        legend.key=element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "NMDS1", colour = "Direction", y = "NMDS2")

pc_ano <- read.csv("/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/nmds_asv_otu.csv")
view(pc_ano)
# Selected data to use & double check only the ASV columns are selected
com_ano = pc_ano[,14:ncol(pc_ano)]
View(com_ano)
m_com_ano = as.matrix(com_ano)
ano_all = anosim(m_com_ano, pc_ano$Site, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
ano_all
ano_allShip = anosim(m_com_ano, pc_ano$Ship, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
ano_allShip
ano_allDirection = anosim(m_com_ano_transect, pc_ano_transect$Direction, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
ano_allDirection
ano_allShip = anosim(m_com_ano_transect, pc_ano_transect$Ship, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
ano_allShip

ano_allLocation = anosim(m_com_ano_transect, pc_ano_transect$Location, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
ano_allLocation
anoISloc = anosim(m_comAOIS, pcAOIS$Location, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
anoISloc
anoYear = anosim(m_com_ano, pc_ano$Year, distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
anoYear
Acc = anosim(m_com_Acc, pc_Acc$Direction,distance = "bray", permutations = 9999)
Acc
at = anosim(m_com_AowaT, pc_AowaT$Direction, distance = "bray", permutations =9999)
at
#create transect only pc and m_com_ano, 
pc_ano_transect <- filter(pc, Site == "Transect")
pc_Acc <- filter(pc_ano_transect, Ship =="Accomac")
pc_AowaT <- filter(pc_ano_transect, Ship == "Aowa")
com_ano_transect = pc_ano_transect[,14:ncol(pc_ano_transect)]
com_Acc = pc_Acc[,14:ncol(pc_Acc)]
com_AowaT = pc_AowaT[,14:ncol(pc_AowaT)]
m_com_ano_transect <- as.matrix(com_ano_transect)
m_com_Acc <- as.matrix(com_Acc)
m_com_AowaT <- as.matrix(com_AowaT)
#create AOIS only pc, com, and m_com
pcAOIS <- filter(pc, Site == "Inter-Ship")
comAOIS = pcAOIS[,14:ncol(pcAOIS)]
m_comAOIS <- as.matrix(comAOIS)
```
##CCA PLOTS
```{ r Load Packages}
library(vegan)
library(phyloseq)
library(CCA)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{ r Load and Combine Data}
comm <- com_order.mdf
comm2324 <- comordertrans2324.mdf
metatrans2324 <- metaTrans %>%
  filter(!Year == "2022")
env <- meta %>%
  dplyr::select(Site, Year, Ship, Direction, Meters, Cr, Cu, Fe, Pb, Sample_id)
YSIData <- read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/YSIDATA.csv")
rownames(YSIData) <- YSIData$Sample_id
rownames(metatrans2324) <- metatrans2324$Sample_id
YSIData <- YSIData[match(metatrans2324$Sample_id,
                         rownames(YSIData)), ]
all(rownames(YSIData) == metatrans2324$Sample_id) #checks metadata alignment, 

metatrans2324YSI <- cbind(metatrans2324, YSIData)
metatrans2324YSI <- metatrans2324YSI[, -16]

env2324 <- metatrans2324YSI %>%
  dplyr::select(Sample_id, Site, Year,Ship, Direction, Meters, Cr, Cu, Fe, Pb, Salinity..PSU., Season, pH, Year, Temperature..ºC..)

env$Site <- factor(env$Site)
env$Ship <- factor(env$Ship)
env$Direction <- factor(env$Direction)
env$Year <- factor(env$Year)
env2324$Site <- factor(env2324$Site)
env2324$Ship <- factor(env2324$Ship)
env2324$Direction <- factor(env2324$Direction)
```

```{r Build CCAs}
CCA1 <- cca(com_order.mdf ~ Site + Ship + Direction + Meters + Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb, data = env)
CCA2 <- cca(com_order.mdf ~ Site + Ship + Meters + Cr + Cu + Fe+ Pb, data = env)
CCA3 <- cca(com_order.mdf ~ Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb, data = env)
CCA4 <- cca(com_order.mdf ~ Site + Ship + Meters, data = env)
CCA5 <- cca(comm2324 ~ Salinity..PSU. + Season + pH + Temperature..ºC.., data = env2324)
CCA6 <- cca(comm2324 ~ Salinity..PSU. + Season + pH + Temperature..ºC.. + Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb, data = env2324)
CCA7 <- cca(comm2324 ~Salinity..PSU. + Season + pH + Temperature..ºC.. + Ship + Meters, data = env2324)
CCA8 <- cca(com_order.mdf ~ Pb + Fe + Meters + Site + Ship, data = env)
CCA9 <- cca(comm2324 ~ Pb + Fe + pH + Ship, data =env2324)

summary(CCA1)
summary(CCA2)
summary(CCA3)
summary(CCA4)
summary(CCA5)
summary(CCA6)
summary(CCA7)
summary(CCA8)
summary(CCA9)
```
```{r Plot CCAs}
plot(CCA1)
plot(CCA1, display = c("sites", "bp"), scaling = 2)
plot(CCA2)
plot(CCA3)
plot(CCA4)
plot(CCA5)
plot(CCA6)
plot(CCA7)
plot(CCA8)
plot(CCA9)
```
``` {r Score Sites and Arrows}
sites <- scores(CCA1, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
sites_df <- as.data.frame(sites)
sites_df$Sample_id <- rownames(sites_df)
sites_df <- cbind(sites_df, env)   # add metadata for coloring
sites_df
sitesCCA2 <- scores(CCA2, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
sitesCCA2_df <- as.data.frame(sitesCCA2)
sitesCCA2_df$Sample_id <- rownames(sitesCCA2_df)
sitesCCA2_df <- cbind(sitesCCA2_df, env)   # add metadata for coloring
sitesCCA2_df
SCA3 <- scores(CCA3, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA3df <- as.data.frame(SCA3)
SCA3df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA3df)
SCA3df <- cbind(SCA3df, env)
SCA3df
SCA4 <- scores(CCA4, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA4df <- as.data.frame(SCA4)
SCA4df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA4df)
SCA4df <- cbind(SCA4df, env)
SCA4df
SCA5 <- scores(CCA5, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA5df <- as.data.frame(SCA5)
SCA5df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA5df)
SCA5df <- cbind(SCA5df, env2324)
SCA5df
SCA6 <- scores(CCA6, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA6df <- as.data.frame(SCA6)
SCA6df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA6df)
SCA6df <- cbind(SCA6df, env2324)
SCA6df
SCA7 <- scores(CCA7, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA7df <- as.data.frame(SCA7)
SCA7df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA7df)
SCA7df <- cbind(SCA7df, env2324)
SCA7df
SCA8 <- scores(CCA8, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA8df <- as.data.frame(SCA8)
SCA8df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA8df)
SCA8df <- cbind(SCA8df, env)
SCA8df
SCA9 <- scores(CCA9, display = "sites", scaling = 2)
SCA9df <- as.data.frame(SCA9)
SCA9df$Sample_id <- rownames(SCA9df)
SCA9df <- cbind(SCA9df, env2324)
SCA9df

arrows <- scores(CCA1, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
arrows_df <- as.data.frame(arrows)
arrows_df$Variable <- rownames(arrows_df)
arrows_df
arrowsCCA2 <- scores(CCA2, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
arrowsCCA2_df <- as.data.frame(arrowsCCA2)
arrowsCCA2_df$Variable <- rownames(arrowsCCA2_df)
arrowsCCA2_df
A3 <- scores(CCA3, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A3df <- as.data.frame(A3)
A3df$Variable <- rownames(A3df)
A3df
A4 <- scores(CCA4, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A4df <- as.data.frame(A4)
A4df$Variable <- rownames(A4df)
A4df
A5 <- scores(CCA5, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A5df <- as.data.frame(A5)
A5df$Variable <- rownames(A5df)
A5df
A6 <- scores(CCA6, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A6df <- as.data.frame(A6)
A6df$Variable <- rownames(A6df)
A6df
A7 <- scores(CCA7, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A7df <- as.data.frame(A7)
A7df$Variable <- rownames(A7df)
A7df
A8 <- scores(CCA8, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A8df <- as.data.frame(A8)
A8df$Variable <- rownames(A8df)
A8df
A9 <- scores(CCA9, display = "bp", scaling = 2)
A9df <- as.data.frame(A9)
A9df$Variable <- rownames(A9df)
A9df
```
```{r plot CCAs}
library(ggplot2)
SCA9df$Meters <- as.factor(SCA9df$Meters)
SCA4df$Year <- as.factor(SCA4df$Year)
SCA5df$Temperature..ºC.. <- as.factor(SCA5df$Temperature..ºC..)
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = SCA3df,
             aes(x = CCA1, y = CCA2, color = Sample_id),
             size = 2.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  
  geom_segment(data = A3df,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = CCA1, yend = CCA2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               linewidth = 1, alpha = 1) +
  geom_text_repel( data = A3df, aes(x = CCA1, y = CCA2, label = Variable), size = 3, vjust = 0.75 ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.5))+
  geom_text_repel(data = SCA3df,
                  aes(x = CCA1, y = CCA2, label = Sample_id), size = 2, color= "forestgreen", max.overlaps = Inf) +
    labs(title = "CCA with Environmental, Ship, and Metal Variables as Arrows",
       x = "CCA1",
       y = "CCA2")
```
```{r PERMANOVA for CCAs}
all(rownames(comm) == env$Sample_id)

P1 <-adonis2(comm ~ Site + Year + Ship + Direction + Meters + Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb,
             data = env,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999,
             by = "terms")
print(P1)
P2 <-adonis2(comm ~ Site + Year + Ship + Meters + Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb,
             data = env,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999)
print(P2)
P3 <-adonis2(comm ~ Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb,
             data = env,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999,
             by = "terms")
print(P3)
P4 <-adonis2(comm ~ Site + Year + Ship + Meters,
             data = env,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999,
             by = "terms")
print(P4)
P4a <-adonis2(comm ~ Site + Ship + Meters,
             data = env,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999,
             by = "terms")
print(P4a)
P1a <-adonis2(comm ~ Site + Ship + Direction + Meters + Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb,
             data = env,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999)
print(P1a)
P5 <-adonis2(comm2324 ~ Salinity..PSU. + pH + Season + Temperature..ºC..,
             data = env2324,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999,
             by = "terms")
print(P5)
P6 <-adonis2(comm2324 ~ Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb + Salinity..PSU. + pH + Season + Temperature..ºC..,
             data = env2324,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999)
print(P6)
P7 <-adonis2(comm2324 ~ Ship + Meters + Salinity..PSU. + pH + Season + Temperature..ºC..,
             data = env2324,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999)
print(P7)


P8 <-adonis2(comm2324 ~ Ship + Direction + Meters + Cr + Cu + Fe + Pb + Salinity..PSU. + pH + Season + Temperature..ºC..,
             data = env2324,
             method = "bray",
             permutations = 999,
             by = "terms")
print(P8)
P9 <- adonis2(comm ~ Pb + Fe +  Meters + Site + Ship, 
              data = env,
              method = "bray",
              permutations = 999)
print(P9)
P10 <- adonis2(comm2324 ~ Pb + Fe + pH + Ship, 
              data = env2324,
              method = "bray",
              permutations = 999,
              by = "terms")
print(P10)
P11 <- adonis2(comm ~ Cr, 
              data = env,
              method = "bray",
              permutations = 999)
print(P11)
P12 <- adonis2(comm ~ Cu, 
               data = env,
               method = "bray",
               permutations = 999)
print(P12)
P13 <- adonis2(comm ~ Cr +Cu, 
               data = env,
               method = "bray",
               permutations = 999)
print(P13)
P14 <- adonis2(comm ~ Ship, 
               data = env,
               method = "bray",
               permutations = 999)
P14
P15 <- adonis2(comm ~ Meters, 
               data = env,
               method = "bray",
               permutations = 999)
P15
P16 <- adonis2(comm2324 ~ pH, 
               data = env2324,
               method = "bray",
               permutations = 999,
               by = "terms")
P16
```
## Rarefaction
```{ r Load Packages}
library(ggplot2)
library(vegan)
```

```{r wrangling}
asv_otu_all <- read.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/asv_otu.csv")
rownames(asv_otu_all) <- asv_otu_all$ASV
asv_otu_all <- asv_otu_all[, -1]
```

```{r Plot all AG OTU counts}
# 1. Prepare the data
d4 <- (as.data.frame(asv_otu_all))
d4 <- t(d4)
d4 <- (as.data.frame(d4))
d4$colsum <- rowSums(d4) 
d4$group <- rownames(d4)

# 2. Plot with labels
p5 <- ggplot(d4, aes(x = reorder(group, -colsum), y = colsum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  # Add the count labels
  geom_text(aes(label = colsum), hjust = -0.2, size = 3.5) + 
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  # Expand the y-axis (which is horizontal now) slightly to make room for the labels
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(x = "Sample ID", y = "Total Count", title = "All Ag sample OTU counts")

p5
ggsave("C:/Users/watts/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Thesis/OTUs_ALL2.pdf", plot=p5, device="pdf", scale=1, width= 500, height= 600, units = "cm", dpi=600, limitsize=F, bg="white")
```

```{r Rarefaction Steps}
# 1. Find the minimum sample size (library depth) for rarefaction
sample_sums <- colSums(asv_otu_all)

# We find the smallest sample sum to use as our depth
min_depth <- min(sample_sums)

# Readout
print(paste("Rarefying all samples to a depth of:", min_depth, "reads"))

# 4. Set a random seed for reproducibility
set.seed(42) 

# 5. Perform rarefaction
asv_rarefied <- rrarefy(asv_otu_all, sample = min_depth)

# 6. Check the new row sums to confirm
print("New row sums after rarefaction:")
print(rowSums(asv_rarefied))

# 'otu_rarefied' is your new data frame with rarefied counts
asv_rel <- prop.table(as.matrix(asv_rarefied), margin = 1)
#write.csv("C:/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/R FIles/asv_rel.csv")

```

```{r Bray Curtis Again}
MetadataALL <- read.csv("./MetadataALL.csv")
NMDSmeta <- read.csv("./nmds_asv_otu.csv")
m_com <- asv_rel
#Run NMDS using Bray-Curtis distance
set.seed(123)

nmds <- metaMDS(m_com, distance="bray", trymax = 15) #stress = 0.1244532 
nmds

nmds <- metaMDS(t(m_com), distance="bray", trymax = 15) #stress = 0.1244532 
nmds

# Calculate
m_com_BC <- vegdist(t(m_com), method = "bray")

nmds_bc <- metaMDS(m_com_BC, distance="bray", trymax = 15) #stress = 0.1244532 
nmds_bc

plot(nmds_bc)
#access the specific points data of the NMDS plot & scores
str(nmds_bc)
nmds_bc$points
scores(nmds_bc)

#extract nmds_bc scores
#data.scores = as.data.frame(scores(nmds_bc)$sites)

# dianostics
class(nmds_bc)
str(nmds_bc)

data.scores <- as.data.frame(nmds_bc$points)

#add columns to data frame
data.scores$Sample_id = rownames(data.scores)
data.scores$Location = MetadataALL$Location
data.scores$Direction = MetadataALL$Direction
data.scores$Sample_year = MetadataALL$Year
data.scores$Site = MetadataALL$Site

head(data.scores)
xx = ggplot(data.scores, aes(x = MDS1, y = MDS2)) +
 geom_point(size = 3, aes(colour = Site))+
  scale_fill_discrete()+
  ggtitle("NMDS Ordination - Samples Across Site")+
 theme(axis.text.y = element_text(colour = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
       axis.text.x = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold", size = 12),
       legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face ="bold", colour ="black"),
       legend.position = "right", axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
       axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, colour = "black"),
       legend.title = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
       panel.background = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
       legend.key=element_blank()) +
 labs(x = "NMDS1", colour = "location", y = "NMDS2")
xx
ggsave("/Users/wattsm24/OneDrive - East Carolina University/Documents/Thesis/RDS files for tax/MicrobialPlots/NEWNMDS.png", width = 10, height = 10)
```
